meta.title: Michel Ribeiro Viana — Senior QA Engineer | AI-First Testing
meta.description: Senior QA Engineer with 13+ years of experience and an AI-First mindset. Specializing in Robot Framework, Cypress, and Prompt Engineering for Quality Assurance.

about.title: Driving Quality Through AI Innovation
about.description: Senior QA with over 13 years of experience and an AI-First Mindset, strategically leading Greenfield Projects and Critical System Turnarounds. I specialize in leveraging LLMs to architect testing solutions before code is written, using GitHub Copilot to maximize speed and coverage across Robot Framework and Cypress.

highlights.description: Leveraging LLMs and GitHub Copilot to architect test solutions before implementation

builtWith.title: Built With AI
builtWith.description: This portfolio is a live proof-of-concept. Every section was designed, written, and coded through a structured multi-agent orchestration — documenting how Prompt Engineering skills translate into real engineering output.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Real challenges. Structured thinking. Measurable outcomes. Cases are being decoded and will be published soon.
projects.placeholder: Case study being decoded — coming soon.

items.title: Legacy Energy Platform Turnaround
items.challenge: 5-year stalled mission-critical energy billing system. Oracle DB, 200+ business rules, no test coverage.
items.approach: Defined E2E test architecture from scratch. Led homologation sessions with C-level stakeholders.
items.result: Production-ready in 6 months. 100% business rule coverage. Zero critical regressions post-go-live.

items.title: AI-Accelerated BDD — Agro Report
items.challenge: Greenfield agricultural data platform with no existing test infrastructure and tight delivery timeline.
items.approach: Bootstrapped full BDD framework. Used GitHub Copilot to accelerate scenario authoring 3×.
items.result: 100% BDD coverage at launch. API contracts validated via Bruno/Postman. 0 regression escapes.

items.title: NFSE Fiscal Automation — TOTVS ERP
items.challenge: Brazil's #1 ERP needed automated fiscal invoice validation across complex multi-rule scenarios.
items.approach: Built API automation suite + MongoDB data validation layer covering full NFS-e lifecycle.
items.result: Zero compliance escapes. Full invoice lifecycle fully covered. Fiscal integrity guaranteed at scale.

highlights: Unblocked a 5-year stalled legacy energy platform → production-ready in 6 months
Led homologation with C-level stakeholders — 100% business rule compliance achieved
End-to-End validation (Frontend ↔ Oracle DB) ensuring zero data integrity regressions

Automated critical NFSE fiscal validation for Brazil's #1 ERP — zero compliance escapes
API test scripting + MongoDB data validation across complex fiscal transaction flows
Fiscal integrity guarantee covering 100% of invoice lifecycle scenarios
Single point of contact bridging 3 dev squads → 40% reduction in cross-team blockers

Multi-platform regression coverage: Web + Android — exploratory + usability testing
Python + Selenium automation suite stabilizing mission-critical logistics operations
International QA for Burger King & Popeyes — multi-region POS validation
Critical Point-of-Sale system + API testing across payment and order flows
